summary.CUS-001: Enhanced GET /api/platform/users with pagination (page/size/sort), search (public_user_id/display_name/phone), aggregate fields (conversation_count/open_conversation_count/ticket_count/wallet_balance), filters (account_id/has_whatsapp/lifecycle_status/registration_site_id/is_anonymous). Backward compatible: no page param returns full list.
summary.CUS-002: Added GET /api/customers/{customer_id}/timeline - merged timeline from messages, tickets, verifications, WhatsApp bindings, wallet ledger, and withdrawals, sorted by created_at descending.
summary.CUS-003: Added POST /api/customers/batch-lifecycle - batch update lifecycle_status for multiple customers (active/frozen/blacklisted). Supports lookup by internal id or public_user_id.
